hero.title: The Agile Infrastructure for Institutional Capital
hero.description: Tokenize Real-World Assets with upgradeable smart contracts. Future-proof compliance, automated lifecycle management, and T+0 settlement.

partners.label: SECURING THE NEXT GENERATION OF FINANCE WITH INDUSTRY LEADERS.

value.title: Beyond Tokenization. Intelligent Financial Infrastructure.
value.description: Streamline the lifecycle of evergreen funds, SPVs, and yield-bearing assets with infrastructure built for institutional scale.

cards.title: Yield-Native Architecture
cards.description: Built for Private Credit and Treasuries. Automate daily yield accrual, coupon distribution, and tax reporting logic directly on-chain.

cards.title: The Diamond Standard(TM)
cards.description: Powered by Diamond Proxy technology (EIP-2535). Upgrade your compliance modules instantly without migrating assets or disrupting investors.

cards.title: Your Liquidity. Your Rules.
cards.description: Avoid the 'walled gardens.' Deploy institutional-grade liquidity on AMMs and new financial rails, secondary markets, and distribution channels.

roles.title: Infrastructure That Adapts to Your Role.

bullets.title: Automated Yield:
bullets.text: Program daily interest accruals and auto-distribute to investor wallets.

bullets.title: Liquidity Optionality:
bullets.text: Offer secondary market liquidity via white-label bulletin boards.

bullets.title: Capital Efficiency:
bullets.text: Use tokenized assets as collateral in DeFi protocols.

bullets.title: Atomic Settlement:
bullets.text: Instant DVP (Delivery vs. Payment) settlement eliminates T+2 delays.

bullets.title: Real-Time Cap Table:
bullets.text: A single source of truth that updates instantly with every transfer.

bullets.title: Integrated Reporting:
bullets.text: Seamless API export to existing ERP and fund accounting systems.

roles.caption: Built for the assets that matter in 2026.

assets.title: Private Credit
assets.description: Automate loan amortization, interest payments, and collateral management.

assets.title: Real Estate
assets.description: Fractionalize equity and automate rent distribution for commercial or residential assets.

assets.title: SPVs & Evergreen Funds
assets.description: Streamline capital calls and distributions with automated subscriptions, redemptions, and real-time NAV updates.

smartContracts.title: Smart Contracts That Evolve With the Law.
smartContracts.description: The "immutability Paradox" is solved. Nomyx allows you to upgrade compliance logic and yield structures without migrating assets or changing token addresses.

bullets.title: Zero-Migration Upgrades:
bullets.text: Regulatory change in 2026? Update the compliance module instantly. No token swaps required.

bullets.title: Modular Security:
bullets.text: Audit individual facets independently. Keep the core asset secure while iterating on features.

bullets.title: Eternal Longevity:
bullets.text: Build on infrastructure designed to last decades, not just the current crypto cycle.

developers.title: No-Code Simplicity. Full-Code Control.
developers.description: While business teams manage assets via the dashboard, your engineering team retains full control. Nomyx is built on an API-first architecture, allowing seamless integration with your existing ERP, CRM, and fund administration software.
bullets: GraphQL & REST APIs for all lifecycle management.
Export compliance logs directly to external audit tools.

security.title: Enterprise-Grade Security & Compliance.
security.description: Your reputation is your asset. We protect it with banking-grade infrastructure.

cta.title: Ready to modernize your AUM?
